---
title: " "
format:
  html:
    css: style.css
    toc: false
include-after-body:
  text: |
    <script>document.body.classList.add('homepage');</script>
---
```{=html}
<section class="hero-banner">
  <img src="img/banner3.png" alt="Banner" class="hero-background">
  <div class="hero-overlay">
    <h2>Welcome to Jackie Ernest's Website</h2>
    <p>Explore research, applications, and more.</p>
  </div>
</section>
```
